# URL Contract: Public Routes

**Deployment base**: `https://shyben.github.io` (no `basePath`)
**Generated by**: `next build` with `output: 'export'` + `trailingSlash: true`

---

## Routes

| Route | File generated | Component | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `/` | `out/index.html` | `app/page.tsx` | Home: Hero + Projects + About + Contact |
| `/projects/<slug>/` | `out/projects/<slug>/index.html` | `app/projects/[slug]/page.tsx` | One file per project slug |
| `/404` | `out/404.html` | `app/not-found.tsx` | Served by GitHub Pages for unknown paths |

## Project slugs (initial)

| Slug | URL |
|---|---|
| `reporting-dashboard` | `/projects/reporting-dashboard/` |
| `llm-integration-service` | `/projects/llm-integration-service/` |
| `ecommerce-platform` | `/projects/ecommerce-platform/` |
| `devops-pipeline-toolkit` | `/projects/devops-pipeline-toolkit/` |
| `mobile-task-manager` | `/projects/mobile-task-manager/` |

## Static assets

| Path | Content |
|---|---|
| `/resume.pdf` | CV download (may be absent; handled gracefully) |
| `/images/projects/<slug>.webp` | Project thumbnail (fallback: inline SVG) |
| `/images/profile/profile.webp` | Profile photo (fallback: initials avatar SVG) |

## Navigation anchors (within home page)

| Anchor | Target section |
|---|---|
| `/#projects` | Projects grid |
| `/#about` | About section |
| `/#contact` | Contact section |

## Routing constraints

- All routes MUST be reachable by direct URL (no 404 on hard refresh).
- No dynamic server routes — every URL resolves to a pre-generated file.
- `basePath` change (e.g. to `/portfolio`) requires updating `NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH` env var;
  no code changes required.
